name: A Systematic Investigation of RL-Jailbreaking in LLMs

description: arXiv:2605.07032v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The evolution of generative models from next-token predictors to autonomous engines of complex systems necessitates rigorous safety hardening.
